problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
